text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer, and preparations for the autumn
Tenno Sho are underway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is more focused than ever,
determined to achieve the feat of successive wins
in both the spring and autumn races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filled to the brim with motivation, she begins her
final summer camp!
